codeReview.summary: This rerun adequately fixes the prior blocking scrutiny failure. Relative to the original failed commit `5edc93267cf563ad65b6613d429bf2b5629aaa11`, the fix commit replaces both remaining `placeholder:text-muted` usages in `ScenarioSwitcher.tsx` with `placeholder:text-white/60`, and the current codebase has no remaining `placeholder:text-muted`, `placeholder:text-secondary`, `placeholder:text-[#a0a0a0]`, or `placeholder:text-[#707070]` matches anywhere under `src/components`. The enforcement test was broadened from the original single `text-[#a0a0a0]` scan to explicit checks for all four forbidden placeholder patterns plus direct `text-muted` class usage in component class strings, which closes the regression gap called out in the prior review.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The shared library still gives conflicting guidance on whether `--text-muted` is border-only or an allowed muted text token, which can mislead future readability sweeps.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/test/vision/.factory/library/design-system.md:35-38` says `--text-muted` is for non-interactive dividers/borders only and never for text, but `/Users/test/vision/.factory/library/tradebetter-exact-design-reference.md:805-808` still labels `--text-muted` as `deemphasized`, and `/Users/test/vision/.factory/library/tradebetter-comparison-evidence.md:42-43` plus `:58-59` still document `--text-muted` as tradebetter muted text.

summary: Pass. The fix removes the remaining grey placeholder text in `ScenarioSwitcher`, purges the specified forbidden placeholder-grey patterns from component files, and extends the white-text enforcement test to cover the regression that caused the prior failure. The only follow-up is a shared-state documentation inconsistency about whether `--text-muted` may ever be used for text.
